title: About MaxIOFS
descriptionText: MaxIOFS is a high-performance S3-compatible object storage system built with Go and React. Designed to be simple, portable, and deployable as a single binary with an embedded modern web interface. Features full multi-tenancy support, Pebble-powered crash-safe metadata storage, and comprehensive S3 API compatibility with 40+ operations including bulk operations, object lock, and advanced bucket management.
mainDeveloperDescription: Project entirely developed by Aluisco Ricardo. MaxIOFS was born as a solution to provide enterprise-grade S3-compatible object storage in a simple and efficient way, with complete multi-tenant support, high-performance crash-safe metadata storage using Pebble, and production-ready security features.
featureS3CompatibleDesc: Full S3 API implementation with 40+ operations including multipart uploads, presigned URLs, and bulk operations (up to 1000 objects)
featureMultiTenantDesc: Complete tenant isolation with configurable quotas, cascading deletes, deletion validation, and global admin cross-tenant visibility
featureSecurityDesc: AES-256-GCM authenticated encryption at rest (64 KB chunks, tamper-proof), JWT + 2FA authentication, AWS Signature v2/v4, comprehensive audit logging (20+ event types), compliance-ready (GDPR, SOC 2, HIPAA, ISO 27001)
featurePerformanceDesc: Pebble (CockroachDB's LSM-tree engine) metadata store with crash-safe WAL, metadata-first deletion pipeline, and stress-tested with 7000+ objects using MinIO Warp
featureSingleBinaryDesc: Packaged as a single executable with embedded React frontend, no external dependencies, and easy deployment
featureModernUIDesc: React 19 + TypeScript interface with dark mode support, real-time metrics, responsive design, and comprehensive management features
featureAdvancedS3Desc: Object Lock (WORM), Bucket Versioning, Bucket Policies (JSON), CORS, Lifecycle rules, Object Tagging, and Object ACLs
featureBulkOperationsDesc: DeleteObjects API (up to 1000 objects), sequential processing to avoid conflicts, complete metadata consistency
featureDualStorageDesc: Pebble for crash-safe object metadata (LSM-tree, pure-Go, no CGO), SQLite for authentication, audit logs & cluster state, filesystem for object storage with atomic operations
developedWithPassion: Developed with passion by Aluisco Ricardo
